content.text: The system shall provide a Pre-Inspection Guide option under each element in Rules and Action → (Select Element) context menu.
a Pre-Inspection Guide option under each element’s context menu in Rules and Action,
I can view or configure pre-inspection checklist items specific to that element.
the user opens the context menu (⋮) beside any element,
a Pre-Inspection Guide option shall be visible and clickable.
When the user selects Pre-Inspection Guide, the system shall open the corresponding screen with breadcrumb navigation (e.g. Rules and Action / Baseplate Pre-Inspection Guide).
the Pre-Inspection Guide to open in a new screen with breadcrumbs,
I can navigate easily and know which element’s guide I’m editing.
the system shall open the corresponding screen with breadcrumbs like Rules and Action / [Element Name] Pre-Inspection Guide.
The system shall display a searchable table listing all existing pre-inspection items for the selected element with the following columns:
view a list of all existing Pre-Inspection items for the selected element,
I can review or update them as needed.
the Pre-Inspection Guide page is loaded,
the system shall display a searchable table with columns:
The system shall allow users to search existing items in real time using the Search Issues… bar above the table.
search Pre-Inspection items in real time,
I can quickly locate specific checklist points.
the user types in the Search Issues… bar,
the list shall filter dynamically to show only matching items.
When the user clicks Add New Pre-Inspection Item, a blank editable row shall appear at the bottom of the table to enter the checklist item name.
click the “Add New Pre-Inspection Item” button,
a blank editable row appears in the table allowing me to enter a new checklist item name.
the user is on the Pre-Inspection Guide screen,
the user clicks the “Add New Pre-Inspection Item” button,
the system shall insert a blank editable row at the bottom of the table,
the cursor shall auto-focus in the new row’s input field labeled “Item Description” (or equivalent),
the user can immediately start typing the new checklist item name.
The system shall allow multiple new items to be added sequentially before saving. Each new item shall be auto-numbered using the same element prefix (e.g. BSP-12074).
add multiple new items one after another before saving,
I can update the checklist in one go.
the system shall auto-assign temporary numbering using the same element prefix (e.g., BSP-12074).

7.title: Enable Edit Mode for Existing Items

content.text: The system shall provide an Edit Pre-Inspection Item button in the header of the screen. When clicked, all rows shall switch to an editable state (inline edit).
switch all existing Pre-Inspection items to edit mode,
I can modify descriptions or delete unwanted items.
the user clicks Edit Pre-Inspection Item in the header,
all table rows shall become editable inline.
In Edit Mode, each row shall display:
• An editable text box for the item name.
• A delete (🗑️) icon for removing items temporarily from the list.
each row in edit mode to have editable text boxes and delete icons,
I can easily modify or remove checklist points.
Editable text field for item name
When a user deletes a row in Edit Mode, the system shall remove that row from the table immediately in the UI but shall only finalize deletion after the user clicks Save Changes.
deleted rows in edit mode to disappear immediately but only finalize on save,
I can review changes before committing them.
a user deletes a row in edit mode,
But it shall only be permanently deleted after clicking Save Changes.
The system shall provide Save Changes and Discard Changes buttons in the footer while in Edit Mode.
Save Changes and Discard Changes buttons to appear in edit mode,
I can choose whether to apply or cancel my updates.
the user views the footer section,
the buttons Save Changes and Discard Changes shall be visible.
Clicking Save Changes shall validate all non-empty fields, update existing items, add new ones, and delete removed items in the backend.
the Save Changes action to validate and update all modifications,
the backend reflects the final checklist.
I know my updates were successful.
the system shall display a toast notification:
Clicking Discard Changes shall revert all unsaved modifications and restore the last saved list view.
I can revert back to the last saved version safely.
the user is in edit mode,
the system shall restore the last saved list and exit edit mode.
The system shall not allow saving if any new item field is left blank; an inline validation message “Item name is required.” shall be displayed below the respective row.
validation errors to appear if any item field is empty,
I can ensure all checklist items are properly named.
the user attempts to save with a blank item name,
the system shall prevent saving and display an inline error:
The system shall automatically assign unique IDs (Pre-Inspection Item Pins) to newly added checklist items following the element’s code pattern.
the system to auto-assign unique Pre-Inspection Item Pins to new checklist items,
the user adds new checklist items,
unique IDs shall be generated automatically using the element’s prefix pattern (e.g., BSP-12075).

16.title: Instant Update in Rules and Action List

content.text: The system shall ensure all updates in the Pre-Inspection Guide are reflected immediately when revisiting the related element in the Rules and Action list.
all Pre-Inspection Guide updates to be visible when I revisit the parent element,
I can immediately see the revised checklist status.
the user revisits the element under Rules and Action,
the Pre-Inspection Guide has been updated,
the latest data shall be reflected immediately without page reload.
